question: Were your fingernails broken when you arrived?
answer:
Yes, my toes—my big toes and the ones next to them—were hitting all these rocks on the mountain. I peeled the skin off my shoes, my toenails were coming off, and they were bleeding. 

It was so painful. Still, I had to walk for hours to see my husband.
